experience.title: Financial Analyst
responsibilities: Conducted financial analysis and prepared detailed reports for management review.
Utilized Excel to create financial models and forecasting tools.
Assisted in budget preparation and variance analysis to support financial planning.
Collaborated with the accounting team to ensure compliance with GAAP standards.
Presented financial data and insights to senior management during quarterly reviews.

experience.title: Junior Financial Analyst
responsibilities: Supported senior analysts in preparing financial reports and presentations.
Assisted in data analysis using SQL to retrieve relevant financial metrics.
Participated in investment analysis projects under the guidance of lead analysts.
Maintained financial databases and contributed to the reporting processes.

response.summary: Detail-oriented Financial Analyst with over 5 years of experience in financial reporting, data analysis, and budget forecasting. Proficient in financial modeling and advanced Excel techniques, with a strong understanding of GAAP principles.
